metaDescription: Programs offered by Madison Chinese Dance Academy - cultural enrichment, artist-in-residence, tai chi, and speaking engagements.

blocks.text: The Madison Chinese Dance Academy offers a diverse range of cultural and educational programs that enrich communities.
Dance lessons for Chinese dances, ballet, lyrical, Jazz, and Hip-Hop with associated cultural backgrounds.
Dance and Chinese Art/Folk Art Performances/Demonstrations
Performances/demonstrations for public and private events.
Lunar New Year Celebration Program & Special Events

Full-spectrum program for all levels of schools, libraries, senior centers, private/public organizations, museums, and conferences.Lion dance, dragon dance, Chinese dance, Chinese music, Yo-yo, calligraphy, lanterns, kite, arts & crafts, show and tell

It brings classical technique, expressive storytelling, and cultural heritage to a community through workshops, rehearsals, and performances. Blending elegant movement, breath‑driven expression, and contemporary creativity, the residency, by applying the Embedded Teaching and Learning approach, offers participants a holistic body-mind-heart experience across the performing arts of the East and the West.

Learn to live the time-tested traditional Chinese ways that have been validated by scientific research for a better quality of life. The goals are to maintain or improve physical and mental health, emotional and behavioral well-being, mobility and balance, memory and cognitive abilities, as well as strength and energy (Qi).

On useful Chinese cultural wisdom, such as Chinese ways of healthy living, self-cultivation, thinking, managing, investing, strategizing, and the differences between Chinese and Western cultures and philosophies (CQ framework).
